examples: Packer was an American gold prospector and convicted cannibal.
The prospector panned off bits of sand and gravel scooped from the bed of a stream.
The old prospector had stayed alone up in the mountains so long that he'd gone off his rocker.
This is something that Lunar Prospector will help to clarify over the coming months.
As it flew over the poles, Lunar Prospector picked up bursts of slower neutrons, revealing hydrogen there.
